ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Continued To Oct-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Randi Teichman for Thomas Zimmerman.

Ms. Teichman stated that she could not file the final inventory as random stocks had not been put into the decedent's trust, that they changed the final inventory to a partial and that a Referee needed to be appointed. The matter was continued to October 22, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
